plugin.name: ThreeS_Chat
plugin.author: Joakim
plugin.purpose: Chat capture window: channels + tells in a draggable miniwindow
plugin.description:
Captures all chat channels and tells (via the ThreeS_MIP feed) into a draggable window with timestamps, channel colours and scrollback. Also appends everything to 3s_chat.log next to the plugin.
Commands: chatwin show/hide the window chat clear clear the buffer chat watch <name> bell + highlight when <name> appears chat unwatch <name> stop watching chat watched list watch names chatsize <w> <h> resize the window (default 682x273) Buttons: Up / Dn / End scroll, Clr clears, X hides.

muclient.script:
require "movewindow"
local MIP_ID = "9a8b3c5d1e2f4a6b8c0d2e4f" local WIN = "chatwin_" .. GetPluginID() local W = tonumber(GetVariable("w")) or 682 local H = tonumber(GetVariable("h")) or 273 local MAXLINES = 300 local windowinfo local visible = (GetVariable("visible") ~= "0") local buffer = {} -- { time=, chan=, text= } local page = 0 -- 0 = live tail, 1+ = pages back local watches = {}
local C = { bg = 0x141414, border = 0x604020, title = 0x402818, head = 0x40C0FF, text = 0xE0E0E0, dim = 0x808080, time = 0xA08040, watch = 0x40C0FF, btn = 0x402818, btntext = 0xE0C8A0, }
local CHANCOL = { Tell = 0x40D0FF, Main = 0x5050F0, Party = 0x50D050, Newbie = 0x40C0C0, Shout = 0xE0E0E0, ADMIN = 0xE050E0, Events = 0xD0D040, Viking = 0xD0D000, Whine = 0x5050F0, Gamers = 0xD0A040, Lottery = 0xC0C0C0, Poll = 0xC0C0C0, } local function chancol(c) if CHANCOL[c] then return CHANCOL[c] end if c:find("Viking") then return 0xD0D000 end return 0xB0B0B0 end
local function logfile() return GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) .. "3s_chat.log" end
-- ---------------- buffer ---------------- -- the mud embeds its own channel banner in the text; our coloured tag -- already says the channel, so strip the duplicate local function strip_banner(chan, text) -- banner style: -~* Viking *~- / -^^* Viking Announce *^^- local rest = text:match("^%-[%~%^]+%*%s*.-%s*%*[%~%^]+%-%s*(.*)$") if rest and #rest > 0 then return rest end -- bracket style: [PARTY] / [Viking-Trade] (only when it names the channel) local br, rest2 = text:match("^%[([%w%-%s]+)%]%s*(.*)$") if br and #rest2 > 0 then local a = br:lower():gsub("%W", "") local c = chan:lower():gsub("%W", "") if a ~= "" and c ~= "" and (a == c or a:find(c, 1, true) or c:find(a, 1, true)) then return rest2 end end return text end
local function addline(chan, text) text = text:gsub("[%z\1-\31]", " ") chan = chan:gsub("[%z\1-\31]", " ") text = strip_banner(chan, text) local entry = { time = os.date("%H:%M"), chan = chan, text = text } buffer[#buffer + 1] = entry if #buffer > MAXLINES then table.remove(buffer, 1) end local f = io.open(logfile(), "a") if f then f:write(string.format("[%s] [%s] %s\n", os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), chan, text)) f:close() end for name in pairs(watches) do if text:lower():find(name:lower(), 1, true) then entry.watched = true Sound("SysExclamation") break end end if page == 0 then chat_draw() end end
-- wrap text into rows of width n local function wrap(s, n) local rows = {} while #s > n do rows[#rows + 1] = s:sub(1, n) s = s:sub(n + 1) if #rows >= 3 then break end end if #s > 0 then rows[#rows + 1] = s end return rows end
-- ---------------- window ---------------- local buttons = { { id = "c_up", label = "Up" }, { id = "c_dn", label = "Dn" }, { id = "c_end", label = "End" }, { id = "c_clr", label = "Clr" }, { id = "c_x", label = "X" }, }
function chat_button(flags, id) if id == "c_up" then chat_page(1) elseif id == "c_dn" then chat_page(-1) elseif id == "c_end" then chat_page(0) elseif id == "c_clr" then chat_clear() elseif id == "c_x" then chat_toggle() end end
function chat_draw() if not visible then return end if not windowinfo then windowinfo = movewindow.install(WIN, 7, 0) -- default strip along bottom end WindowCreate(WIN, windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top, W, H, windowinfo.window_mode, windowinfo.window_flags, C.bg) WindowFont(WIN, "f", "Lucida Console", 9, false, false, false, false) WindowFont(WIN, "fb", "Lucida Console", 9, true, false, false, false) WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, 0, 0, W, H, C.border) WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, 1, 1, W - 1, 17, C.title) local title = "Chat" if page > 0 then title = title .. " (back " .. page .. " - End for live)" end WindowText(WIN, "fb", title, 8, 3, 0, 0, C.head) movewindow.add_drag_handler(WIN, 0, 0, W - 190, 17, miniwin.cursor_hand) -- buttons in title bar local bx = W - 188 for _, b in ipairs(buttons) do local bw = 34 WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, bx, 2, bx + bw, 16, C.btn) WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, bx, 2, bx + bw, 16, C.border) WindowText(WIN, "f", b.label, bx + 17 - #b.label * 3, 3, 0, 0, C.btntext) WindowAddHotspot(WIN, b.id, bx, 2, bx + bw, 16, "", "", "chat_button", "", "", b.label, 1, 0) bx = bx + bw + 3 end -- rows, bottom up local rowh = 13 local nrows = math.floor((H - 24) / rowh) local rows = {} -- each: {time, chan, text, first, watched} local skip = page * nrows for i = #buffer, 1, -1 do local e = buffer[i] local wrapped = wrap(e.text, math.floor((W - 130) / 7)) for j = #wrapped, 1, -1 do if skip > 0 then skip = skip - 1 else table.insert(rows, 1, { time = e.time, chan = e.chan, text = wrapped[j], first = (j == 1), watched = e.watched }) end if #rows >= nrows and skip == 0 then break end end if #rows >= nrows then break end end local y = H - 6 - rowh * #rows for _, r in ipairs(rows) do local x = 8 if r.first then WindowText(WIN, "f", r.time, x, y, 0, 0, C.time) x = x + 5 * 7 + 4 local tag = "[" .. r.chan:sub(1, 8) .. "]" WindowText(WIN, "f", tag, x, y, 0, 0, chancol(r.chan)) x = x + #tag * 7 + 5 else x = x + 5 * 7 + 4 + 10 * 7 end WindowText(WIN, "f", r.text, x, y, 0, 0, r.watched and C.watch or C.text) y = y + rowh end if #buffer == 0 then WindowText(WIN, "f", "(no chat captured yet)", 8, 26, 0, 0, C.dim) end WindowShow(WIN, true) end
-- ---------------- commands ---------------- function chat_page(dir) local nrows = math.floor((H - 24) / 13) if dir == 0 then page = 0 else page = math.max(0, page + dir) local maxpage = math.max(0, math.floor((#buffer * 2 - 1) / nrows)) if page > maxpage then page = maxpage end end chat_draw() end
function chat_size(w, h) W = math.max(300, math.min(1600, w)) H = math.max(100, math.min(1200, h)) SetVariable("w", tostring(W)) SetVariable("h", tostring(H)) Note("[chat] window size " .. W .. "x" .. H) chat_draw() end
function chat_clear() buffer = {} page = 0 chat_draw() Note("[chat] cleared") end
function chat_toggle() visible = not visible SetVariable("visible", visible and "1" or "0") if visible then chat_draw() else WindowShow(WIN, false) end Note("[chat] window " .. (visible and "shown" or "hidden")) end
function chat_watch(name, on) if on then watches[name] = true else watches[name] = nil end local t = {} for n in pairs(watches) do t[#t + 1] = n end SetVariable("watches", table.concat(t, "\n")) Note("[chat] watching: " .. (#t > 0 and table.concat(t, ", ") or "(nobody)")) end
function chat_watched() local t = {} for n in pairs(watches) do t[#t + 1] = n end Note("[chat] watching: " .. (#t > 0 and table.concat(t, ", ") or "(nobody)")) end
-- ---------------- wiring ---------------- function OnPluginBroadcast(msg, id, name, text) if id == MIP_ID and msg == 3 then local chan, line = text:match("^(.-)\1(.*)$") if chan then addline(chan, line) end end end
function OnPluginSaveState() if windowinfo then movewindow.save_state(WIN) end SetVariable("visible", visible and "1" or "0") local out = {} for i = math.max(1, #buffer - 99), #buffer do local e = buffer[i] out[#out + 1] = e.time .. "\t" .. e.chan .. "\t" .. e.text end SetVariable("buffer", table.concat(out, "\n")) end
function OnPluginInstall() local w = GetVariable("watches") if w then for n in w:gmatch("[^\n]+") do watches[n] = true end end local b = GetVariable("buffer") if b and b ~= "" then for entry in b:gmatch("[^\n]+") do local t, chan, text = entry:match("^(.-)\t(.-)\t(.*)$") if t then buffer[#buffer + 1] = { time = t, chan = chan, text = text } end end end chat_draw() end
function OnPluginEnable() chat_draw() end function OnPluginDisable() WindowShow(WIN, false) end
